C:\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc libimlib.a CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/filter.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/image.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/transimage.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/linked.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/input.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/palette.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/include.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/fonts.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/specs.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/supmorph.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/pcxread.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/jrand.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/keys.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/dprint.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/status.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/pmenu.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/scroller.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/filesel.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/tools.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/guistat.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/sprite.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/jwindow.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/video.cpp.obj CMakeFiles/imlib.dir/event.cpp.obj
C:\CodeBlocks\MinGW\bin\ranlib.exe libimlib.a
